Package index

All functions

ReticulateMuData
ReticulateMuData
as_reticulate_mudata()
Coerce to ReticulateMuData
.mofaflex_env
MOFAFlex basilisk Python environment
fit_mofaflex()
Train a MOFAFLEX model
is_reticulate_mudata()
Test whether an object is a ReticulateMuData
load_mofaflex_model()
Load a MOFA-FLEX model into MOFA2
mae_to_reticulate_mudata()
Convert a MultiAssayExperiment to a ReticulateMuData
py_mudata()
Import the Python mudata module (convert = FALSE)
reticulate_mudata()
Constructor alias for ReticulateMuData
sce_assay_to_scipy_csc()
Convert a SingleCellExperiment assay to a scipy CSC sparse matrix
sce_to_anndata()
Convert a SingleCellExperiment to a Python AnnData object
sce_to_reticulate_anndata()
Convert a SingleCellExperiment to an anndataR ReticulateAnnData
sce_to_reticulate_mudata()
Convert a SingleCellExperiment to a ReticulateMuData
`[[`(<ReticulateMuData>)
Extract a modality from a ReticulateMuData
`[[<-`(<ReticulateMuData>)
Assign a modality into a ReticulateMuData
with_mofaflex_env()
Evaluate an expression inside the MOFAFlex Python environment
